headline: QuantumScape Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Eagle Line Gains
summary: QS narrows its Q2 loss as Eagle Line gains and $10.8M in customer billings mark progress toward commercialization.

raw.headline: QuantumScape Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Eagle Line Gains
raw.summary: QS narrows its Q2 loss as Eagle Line gains and $10.8M in customer billings mark progress toward commercialization.

headline: Tesla Q2 Earnings Miss on Higher R&D Costs, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: TSLA's Q2 earnings miss estimates as higher costs pressure profits, despite a 25.5% revenue gain and record vehicle deliveries.

raw.headline: Tesla Q2 Earnings Miss on Higher R&D Costs, Revenues Rise Y/Y
raw.summary: TSLA's Q2 earnings miss estimates as higher costs pressure profits, despite a 25.5% revenue gain and record vehicle deliveries.
